Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elysian Traveler]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Only an Elysian Traveler can open a Gate in Elysia.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — The Elysian Travelers were eradicated by the first Damascan Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Lirial Travelers once protected and spied for the Elysian Travelers of old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — The last Elysian Travelers vanished, faded, or died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Zakareth addresses Alin as an Elysian Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Incarnation identifies Alin as an Elysian Traveler.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth had a lone encounter with the one remaining Elysian Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Elysian Travelers are considered the pinnacle of human virtue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Potential Elysian Travelers receive months of ethics and morality training before compatibility tests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Elysian Travelers used to supervise all other Territories and handle Incarnations breaking through into their world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — It was not uncommon for there to be two natural Elysian Travelers from the same family.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
